title: aquilegia vulgaris var. amaliae
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris var. amaliae, also known as Granny's Bonnet or Amalia's Columbine, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. The health benefits of Aquilegia vulgaris var. amaliae include its ability to alleviate headaches, reduce stress, and promote restful sleep, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used topically in the form of salves or ointments.
